openmc.description: Use for OpenMC Monte Carlo core codebase (C++/Python). Reference for source code, API, tests, and build system.

openmc-templates.description: Use for OpenMC model templates and validated material compositions. Reference for simulation input construction.

openmc-validator.description: Use for OpenMC model validation MCP server. Reference for geometry/materials/settings/tallies validation logic.

openmc-plotter.description: Use for OpenMC native plotting GUI, model design and verification patterns.

openmc-data.description: Use for nuclear cross-section data management scripts and NJOY/HDF5 processing for OpenMC.

openmc-mcnp-adapter.description: Use for converting MCNP input files to OpenMC classes/XML. Reference for geometry/material/tally mapping patterns.

openmc-serpent-adapter.description: Use for converting Serpent input files to OpenMC. Reference for Serpent-to-OpenMC geometry and material mapping.

openmc-cad-adapter.description: Use for converting OpenMC CSG geometry to CAD formats. Reference for CSG-to-CAD export patterns.

openmc-validation.description: Use for OpenMC validation scripts, notebooks, and benchmark results. Reference for V&V methodology.

openmc-notebooks.description: Use for example Jupyter notebooks demonstrating OpenMC usage patterns and API workflows.

openmc-reactor-examples.description: Use for cataloged reactor input models for OpenMC. Reference for reactor geometry and depletion setups.

openmc-plasma-source.description: Use for creating OpenMC plasma source objects from fusion plasma parameters. Reference for DT neutron source sampling.

openmc-dagmc-wrapper.description: Use for DAGMC geometry integration with OpenMC. Reference for CAD-based geometry tallies and workflow patterns.

neutronics-material-maker.description: Use for making reproducible material cards for neutronics codes. Reference for material density and composition handling.

cad-to-dagmc.description: Use for converting CAD (STEP/STP) files or CadQuery assemblies to DAGMC h5m files. Reference for geometry preparation pipeline.

openmc-weight-window-generator.description: Use for generating weight windows for variance reduction in OpenMC. Reference for VR workflow patterns.

openmc-mesh-tally-to-vtk.description: Use for converting OpenMC mesh tallies to VTK files for visualization. Reference for post-processing patterns.

openmc-cell-segmenter.description: Use for segmenting OpenMC cells into smaller cells. Reference for SDR (shutdown dose rate) geometry preparation.

fusion-activation-handbook.description: Use for automated production of fusion materials activation handbook using OpenMC. Reference for activation/decay heat/dose simulation patterns.

neutronics-workshop.description: Use for fusion neutronics workshop materials covering OpenMC, DAGMC, Paramak workflows. Reference for teaching and tutorial patterns.

pydagmc.description: Use for Python interface to DAGMC models via PyMOAB. Reference for DAGMC metadata manipulation and h5m inspection.

parastell.description: Use for parametric 3D modeling of stellarator fusion devices. Reference for stellarator geometry and DAGMC build patterns.

r2s-act.description: Use for Rigorous 2-Step activation workflow. Reference for coupling OpenMC transport with activation calculations.

radial-build-tools.description: Use for building and representing radial builds for fusion power systems. Reference for blanket/shield geometry definition.

ALARA.description: Use for simulation of transmutation and decay in nuclear systems. Reference for activation calculation methodology and data formats.

DAGMC.description: Use for Direct Accelerated Geometry Monte Carlo Toolkit. Reference for CAD-based geometry tracking, ray tracing, and h5m file format.

paramak.description: Use for creating parametric 3D fusion reactor CAD and neutronics models. Reference for parametric geometry build and STEP/DAGMC export.
